posts.raw_content:
Hello frens,
My dad was larger than life. Marine officer. Special Agent in the FBI (when it had morals). International security expert. Professor. Running back for Harvard. The guy was built like a machine and most importantly he loved God and country. 

He served America and his community faithfully for decades. At his funeral at Quantico they flew a missing man formation, a great honor. 

Tragically, this country murdered him in a hospital bed with the Fauci protocol of remdesivir to shut down his kidneys, fill his lungs with fluid and drown him. Alone. No was permitted into the hospital because of “COVID”. 

Fauci is a monster and a traitor. My father was a combat hero. He saved an entire squad in Hue and even though the government poisoned him with Agent Orange, which of course passed down to his children and grand children, he fought on. 

I miss my dad and I wish he could meet his grandson. He’s perfect and smiles just like I did when I was a kid. 

The government lies to us. They hate us. They want us dead. 

I shed a tear for my father this morning, but I know he’s at peace with Jesus today. 

Happy birthday dad. Semper Fi

Thanks for reading frens. Please hug your loved ones today, send them a message that you love them and please, pray. Pray for this world, for our country. 

Call your dad and mom today if you are lucky enough to have them on Earth with you. I am happy for your good fortune. 

And pray for our enemies. They are trying to take everything away from us. Don’t let them take your souls.

Hello frens, My dad was larger than life. Marine officer. Special Agent in the FBI (when it had morals). International security expert. Professor. Running back for Harvard. The guy was built like a machine and most importantly he loved God and country.

He served America and his community faithfully for decades. At his funeral at Quantico they flew a missing man formation, a great honor.

Tragically, this country murdered him in a hospital bed with the Fauci protocol of remdesivir to shut down his kidneys, fill his lungs with fluid and drown him. Alone. No was permitted into the hospital because of “COVID”.

Fauci is a monster and a traitor. My father was a combat hero. He saved an entire squad in Hue and even though the government poisoned him with Agent Orange, which of course passed down to his children and grand children, he fought on.

I miss my dad and I wish he could meet his grandson. He’s perfect and smiles just like I did when I was a kid.

The government lies to us. They hate us. They want us dead.

I shed a tear for my father this morning, but I know he’s at peace with Jesus today.

Happy birthday dad. Semper Fi

Thanks for reading frens. Please hug your loved ones today, send them a message that you love them and please, pray. Pray for this world, for our country.

Call your dad and mom today if you are lucky enough to have them on Earth with you. I am happy for your good fortune.

And pray for our enemies. They are trying to take everything away from us. Don’t let them take your souls.
